testcase.name: @AfterTest closeBrowser
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: invalid session id Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version:
